_comment_for_cyrus: Completed 2026-05-02. All fields filled from resume + Cyrus answers. Agent uses this for every form submission.

experience_summary._note: Default = 3 (two MS internships + full-time FTE, all PM/TPM track). If form offers bucketed ranges like 1-2 vs 3-5, pick 3-5. Only drop to 2 if form explicitly asks full-time-only YOE and 3 would be a knockout.

work_experience.title: Technical Program Manager
work_experience._note: Single source of truth for GH work-experience repeater (company-name-N, title-N, start/end-date-month/year-N, country). Chain_006 sidecar added 2026-05-26. If you add prior roles, append entries (oldest last). Driver fills index 0 first.

education.honors: Academic Excellence Scholarship; Dean's List Distinguished Scholar; Phi Beta Kappa
education._test_scores_note: SAT 1580/1600 (Math 800, Reading/Writing 780; post-2016 1600-scale). ACT/GRE null = Cyrus did not take. ATS dropdowns: SAT picks the '1580 out of 1600' option; ACT/GRE fall back to 'Did not take/Do not recall'. Canonical source: MEMORY.md 2026-05-29 + role-discovery/education_answers.py. Updated 2026-05-30 (gh-academic-fields-2026-05-30).
education._grad_note: Cyrus has no graduate or doctorate degree. Grad/Doctorate GPA fields fall back to 'Other/Not Applicable' / 'Not applicable/Do not recall' option.

_relocation_note: Cyrus is open to relocating ANYWHERE in the USA for any role, and will travel up to 100%. Treat ANY US-based onsite/hybrid/in-office location as ELIGIBLE. A specific-city onsite requirement is NEVER a knockout by itself — answer location/onsite/relocation/in-person questions with home base (Kirkland, WA) + willing_to_relocate=Yes + onsite/in-person=Yes, and SUBMIT. Only bank a row as blocked for a DIFFERENT genuine reason (non-US location, a clearance/citizenship Cyrus lacks, or an infra/captcha wall) — never for a US onsite city.
cities_available_to_work: Open to relocating anywhere in the United States. Currently based in Kirkland, WA (Seattle area).
_demographics_note: ALWAYS prefer 'decline to self-identify' first. If the form requires a real answer (no decline option AND submit blocked), use demographics_forced_fallbacks below. Updated 2026-05-24: Cyrus provided real fallbacks for all demographic fields — no longer skip roles over demographic questions.

demographics_forced_fallbacks.veteran_status: I am not a protected veteran
demographics_forced_fallbacks.disability_status: No, I do not have a disability
demographics_forced_fallbacks._note: ONLY use forced-fallback when the field is required AND has no decline option AND Submit is blocked. Map values to the closest matching option text on the form: 'White' may render as 'White (Not Hispanic or Latino)' / 'Caucasian'; veteran 'I am not a protected veteran' / 'Not a veteran' / 'No'; disability 'No, I do not have a disability' / 'I do not want to answer' inverse / 'No'; LGBTQ 'No' / 'Heterosexual' / 'Straight'.

_optional_field_note: Cyrus prefers minimal disclosure. Do NOT fill optional fields unless the form explicitly marks them required. Applies to: phone alternates, alternate emails, secondary URLs, optional demographic questions, optional 'how did you hear about us' subfields, optional preference questions, optional cover letter, optional referral source, etc.
cover_letter_default: Per your scope decision: no cover letters. If a form makes it required, paste a 3-line generic note pointing the recruiter to the resume.
